filename: # Place this file (renamed to samplesheet.csv) in INPUT_DIR to override per-file metadata.
# One row per image file. Lines beginning with '#' are ignored.
#   filename   : exact image file name as it appears in INPUT_DIR (e.g. m01_PR8_A_s1.czi)
#   mouse_id   : biological replicate id  <-- STATS n IS COUNTED BY THIS
#   section_id : technical section id within a mouse (s1
#   genotype   : WT | Het | KO      (IFN-gamma allele status)
#   condition  : PR8 | naive        (infection state; add timepoint if needed e.g. PR8_d21)
#   panel      : A | B | C | D | P | S | S2   (see README panel legend)
#   relative_path: optional path below INPUT_DIR; required to distinguish duplicate filenames in recursive runs
